features.featureTitle: Add a '/wallet' route to the existing TanStack Router configuration in App.tsx, rendering a new WalletPage component. The Header must remain visible on the Wallet page (shared RootLayout). Add a navigation link or icon in the Header to access the Wallet page.

Create a WalletPage component at 'frontend/src/pages/WalletPage.tsx'. At the top of the page, display an 'Available Balance' card prominently showing a balance value (e.g., '₹0.00' as initial state). Below the balance card, render two action buttons side by side: 'Add Money' and 'Withdraw'. Below the buttons, render a 'Transaction History' section heading and a list of transactions. When no transactions exist, show an empty-state message such as 'No transactions yet'. All styling must follow the existing dark neon-red gaming theme (dark card background, neon red accents, Orbitron font for headings, Rajdhani for body text, neon glow on buttons).

Create a React Query hook 'useWallet' in 'frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts' (or a new file 'frontend/src/hooks/useWallet.ts') that fetches wallet balance via getWalletBalance() and transaction history via getTransactions() from the backend actor. Wire the WalletPage to use this hook: display the fetched balance in the Available Balance card and render the transaction list from the fetched data. Show a loading skeleton while data is fetching and an empty-state message when the transaction list is empty.
